---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..." or "I often need to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible:

- What would the API look like?
- How would users interact with it?
- Include code examples if helpful:

```python
# Example usage
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternatives you've considered or workarounds you've tried.

## Use Case

Describe your use case and why this feature would be valuable to you and other users.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I have provided a concrete use case
